rag_rules: Fix AGREE type errors by resolving root causes in visible identifiers or removing invalid clauses
Move implementation-level bindings from component type annexes to implementation annexes
generic_rules: Validate AGREE expressions for type consistency before deployment
Ensure component type contracts only reference visible ports and features
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree blocks with valid boolean expressions
Implementation-level assignments require valid subcomponent paths in implementation scopes
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the model
Do not place implementation-level references in component type annexes
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
Component type vs implementation scope boundaries
